mapper.insert: INSERT INTO character_events (user_id, event_key, event_type, coin_delta, diary_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{eventKey}, #{eventType}, #{coinDelta}, #{diaryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, event_key) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: UPDATE user_wallets SET balance = balance + #{delta}, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} RETURNING balance
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_item_groups (user_id, group_code) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupCode}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, group_code) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: INSERT INTO user_progress (user_id, confirmed_diary_count, consecutive_days, last_confirmed_date) VALUES (#{userId}, 1, 1, #{writtenDate}::date) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET confirmed_diary_count = user_progress.confirmed_diary_count + 1, consecutive_days = CASE WHEN user_progress.last_confirmed_date = EXCLUDED.last_confirmed_date THEN user_progress.consecutive_days WHEN EXCLUDED.last_confirmed_date < user_progress.last_confirmed_date THEN user_progress.consecutive_days WHEN user_progress.last_confirmed_date = EXCLUDED.last_confirmed_date - 1 THEN user_progress.consecutive_days + 1 ELSE 1 END, last_confirmed_date = GREATEST(user_progress.last_confirmed_date, EXCLUDED.last_confirmed_date), updated_at = now() RETURNING confirmed_diary_count, consecutive_days, resolution_success_count, max_streak_seq
mapper.update: UPDATE user_progress SET resolution_success_count = resolution_success_count + 1, max_streak_seq = GREATEST(max_streak_seq, #{streakSeq}), updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, coin_delta, balance_after, payload::text AS payload, created_at FROM character_events WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND diary_id = #{diaryId} AND event_type = 'DIARY_CONFIRM' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE character_events SET acked_at = now() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND acked_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT d.user_id AS user_id, d.id AS diary_id, d.written_date AS written_date FROM diaries d WHERE d.analysis_status <> 'DRAFT' AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM character_events e WHERE e.user_id = d.user_id AND e.diary_id = d.id AND e.event_type = 'DIARY_CONFIRM' ) ORDER BY d.id LIMIT #{limit}
